name: Crockpot Chicken/Sausage Cassoulet
recipeInstructions:
1. Place carrots, lima beans, celery, and onion at the bottom of the crockpot, which has been sprayed with Pam.
2. Combine herbs, tomato juice, and bouillon in a bowl.
3. Add the mixture to the vegetables in the crockpot.
4. Place chicken on top of the vegetables.
5. Cut sausage into pieces and place on top of the veggies.
6. Cover the crockpot and cook on Low heat for 10 hours or on High heat for 5 hours.
7. Remove bay leaf before serving.
